title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: batch 17 curation dispositioned
body: Closed claim 41d62cf6-aea6-4525-9f37-2272f66f5a51 after processing legacy backlog batch 17 in place. Disposition: 5 items total, 4 duplicate and 1 owner-gated.
